$comment: Pinned test models for Fluence (PLAN 4.3, D-3.2 minimal). The sha256 is the integrity contract: download-test-assets refuses any file whose hash does not match, so the URL is a hint (it may follow a branch) while the content is verified, never trusted. These tiny models validate the engine MECHANICS only (sessions, KV, SSE, next-chars) — never quality (PLAN §1). The llama-server binary is infrastructure, provisioned by CI/dev, not a managed model.

models.purpose: LLM engine mechanics in CI and locally (greedy, seeded). Not a quality baseline.
